meaning: 茂物[印度尼西亚爪哇岛西部城市](音译博果尔)
examples: The second newly confirmed case was a 23-year-old man from Bogor, West Java.
The goal of cutting tariffs by 2020 was first shaped in Bogor, Indonesia, in 1994.
The linkage with the second term review of Bogor Goals will be strengthened while carrying out this study.
In Bogor, near Jakarta, the city government has started to charge an illegal levy on goat imports.
In Bogor, Indonesia, in 1994, it set itself ambitious goals to free up trade and investment within the grouping.
